package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "net/http"
)

// Positive scenario for struct_field_exposed_in_json: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: exported struct fields containing sensitive data (Password, Secret, Token, APIKey, PrivateKey) without `json:"-"` tags in API response structs
type CaseStructFieldExposedInJsonDTO struct {
    ID       string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status   string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount   int    `json:"amount"`
    Payload  []byte `json:"payload"`
}

// Sensitive fields exposed in JSON response without json:"-" tag.
type CaseStructFieldExposedInJsonResponse struct {
    ID           string `json:"id"`
    Email        string `json:"email"`
    Password     string `json:"password"`
    APIKey       string `json:"api_key"`
    SessionToken string `json:"session_token"`
}

type CaseStructFieldExposedInJsonModel struct {
    ID        string       `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID  string       `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status    string       `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseStructFieldExposedInJsonRepository struct {
    db    *gorm.DB
    sql   *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseStructFieldExposedInJsonModel
}

type CaseStructFieldExposedInJsonService struct {
    repo   *CaseStructFieldExposedInJsonRepository
    client *http.Client
}

type CaseStructFieldExposedInJsonAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveStructFieldExposedInJson(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseStructFieldExposedInJsonDTO) error {
    // Returning struct with Password and APIKey fields visible in JSON response.
    user := CaseStructFieldExposedInJsonResponse{
        ID:           input,
        Email:        "user@example.com",
        Password:     "hashed_secret_value",
        APIKey:       "sk-live-abc123",
        SessionToken: "sess-xyz789",
    }
    c.JSON(http.StatusOK, user)
    return nil
}
